texto: Flat outstretched upon a moundOf earth I lie; I press my earAgainst its surface and I hearFar off and deep, the measured soundOf heart that beats within the ground.And with it pounds in harmonyThe swift, familiar heart in me.They pulse as one, together swell,Together fall; I cannot tellMy sound from earth's, for I am partOf rhythmic, universal heart.
explicacao: Citação de Elizabeth Odell sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Flat outstretched upon a moundOf earth I lie; I press my earAgainst its surface and I hearFar off…” articula amor, harmony, nature em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como nature.
